content.hero_headline: Sharp Cuts, Clean Lines, Confident You
content.hero_subtext: Experience premium barbering crafted to keep you looking and feeling your best.
content.about_text: At Client Name, we believe a great haircut is more than just a trim — it's a confidence boost. Our skilled barbers are dedicated to delivering precise, personalized cuts in a welcoming atmosphere. Whether it's your first visit or your fiftieth, you'll always leave looking sharp.
content.contact_text: Book your appointment today and let us take care of the rest!
